description: Curated layout catalog. Strategist selects one layout per page in Design Spec §4.

layouts.title: Executive Overview (16:9)
layouts.use_when: Monthly / quarterly business review, single-page landing, or page 1 of multi-page exec report
layouts.avoid_when: Screen < 1280px, or when audience needs row-level detail (use drillthrough-detail instead)

layouts.title: Sales Performance
layouts.use_when: Sales analytics reports, revenue drill-downs, YoY comparison pages
layouts.avoid_when: Non-sales domains; if no YoY measure exists, substitute a comparison-free layout

layouts.title: Drillthrough Detail
layouts.use_when: Target page for drillthrough from any hub page (product detail, customer detail, region detail)
layouts.avoid_when: As a first-page experience — this is a target page, always drilled into

layouts.title: Operational Single-Screen Status Board
layouts.use_when: Shop-floor / control-room live status board; refresh < 5 min; read-only display
layouts.avoid_when: Screen < 1920px or refresh > 15 min — board loses value

layouts.title: Finance P&L Waterfall
layouts.use_when: Monthly / quarterly P&L walk, plan-vs-actual bridge, cost composition analysis
layouts.avoid_when: When there is no plan/budget measure, or period < 2 months

layouts.title: Manufacturing Line Status (OEE)
layouts.use_when: Line-level OEE board; discrete manufacturing; shop-floor read-only display
layouts.avoid_when: Non-discrete manufacturing; process industries should use a custom OEE variant

layouts.title: Landing / Navigation Hub
layouts.use_when: Page 1 of any multi-page report; button-based navigation hub; bookmark menu entry point
layouts.avoid_when: Single-page reports — skip the hub and go straight to content

layouts.title: Customer 360
layouts.use_when: Customer profile / retention / cohort analysis; CRM-adjacent reports; churn diagnostics
layouts.avoid_when: B2B accounts with > 50 contacts — no single-entity view fits

layouts.title: Marketing Funnel & Attribution
layouts.use_when: Campaign performance; acquisition funnel; channel ROI; attribution reports
layouts.avoid_when: When stage count < 3 or conversion rates unavailable

layouts.title: Geographic / Territory Map
layouts.use_when: Sales territory coverage; logistics / delivery maps; store-network reports; any region-scoped analysis
layouts.avoid_when: When territories overlap or aren't well-defined polygons

layouts.title: Balanced Scorecard / KPI Grid
layouts.use_when: Balanced scorecard; OKR dashboard; dense KPI-only monthly review; traffic-light status page
layouts.avoid_when: When < 6 KPIs exist; grid looks empty

layouts.title: Mobile Portrait (Power BI mobile layout)
layouts.use_when: Power BI mobile app consumption; field-ops quick glance; any page that must render on phone
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop-first reports — use landscape layouts

layouts.title: Tooltip Page (hover detail)
audience: any report user hovering over a visual
layouts.use_when: Custom tooltip (Format pane → Tooltip → Report page); small canvas rendered on hover of a visual mark
layouts.avoid_when: Non-16:9 hover contexts — use wide-flat-tooltip for wide hover areas

layouts.title: Left-Rail Filter Analytical
layouts.use_when: Heavy-filter analytical page where filters must stay visible while readers scan KPIs + hero
layouts.avoid_when: Mobile / narrow screens; rail steals too much width

layouts.title: Variance Dual Waterfall
layouts.use_when: Decompose a variance along two orthogonal dimensions (volume vs price, plan vs forecast) with an auditable matrix
layouts.avoid_when: When variance is < 5% on all accounts — use simpler table

layouts.title: KPI Donut Row
layouts.use_when: Target-driven financial KPIs where progress-to-target framing + variance vs plan is the primary story
layouts.avoid_when: When categorical parts > 8 — legend becomes unreadable

layouts.title: Ops Activity Log
layouts.use_when: Platform / pipeline monitoring with tab-switchable sibling pages, trend + status matrix + detailed log
layouts.avoid_when: Low-volume event streams — looks empty; use detail grid

layouts.title: P&L Statement Grid
layouts.use_when: Pixel-crafted income statement where rows-as-cards + per-row sparkline replace a plain pivot matrix
layouts.avoid_when: When chart-of-accounts has > 200 rows; use summary plus drillthrough

layouts.title: Budget vs Actual Grid
layouts.use_when: Re-forecast / budget review where each metric has an actual AND estimate value displayed side-by-side
layouts.avoid_when: Rolling forecasts without frozen budget baseline

layouts.title: Q&A Explore Page
layouts.use_when: Self-service exploration surface when the model has Q&A synonyms configured
layouts.avoid_when: Non-English tenants without tuned Q&A synonyms

layouts.title: Chiclet Nav Strip
layouts.use_when: Branded sales / commercial / trade page with 1-2 low-cardinality filter dimensions best served by button-style slicers
layouts.avoid_when: Reports with < 4 pages — nav is overhead

layouts.title: Dimension Nav Hub
audience: All report consumers — entry point to multi-page reports
layouts.use_when: Multi-page report (8+ pages) that needs a dedicated 'pick your dimension' entry point distinct from a branded cover. Users jump here from any page via a Home button.
layouts.avoid_when: When dimensions aren't central to the story

layouts.title: Tachometer Gauge Row
audience: Ops managers, logistics supervisors monitoring KPI-vs-target status
layouts.use_when: Operational dashboard where each primary KPI must show *progress against target* instantly (not just a number). Tachometer arcs make above/below target visible at a glance.
layouts.avoid_when: When measures lack meaningful ranges (min/max); gauges become decorative

layouts.title: Full-Page Map
audience: Field sales / territory managers — geography is the primary analysis axis
layouts.use_when: Geographic patterns ARE the story: customer density, route density, store footprint. No other chart would add meaning without competing with the map.
layouts.avoid_when: When < 20 geographic points; use territory map or bar chart

layouts.title: Wide Flat Tooltip
audience: Hover consumers — enrichment when the default 320×240 tooltip is insufficient
layouts.use_when: Tooltip target is a long horizontal row (matrix row, table row, X-axis category) and hovering reveals a trend/comparison that needs more horizontal real estate than a 320×240 card.
layouts.avoid_when: Narrow visuals; use tooltip-page instead

layouts.title: Cohort / Retention Grid
audience: Customer analytics leads, growth / retention analysts
layouts.use_when: Audience needs to see how acquisition cohorts behave over time: % retained at M+1, M+2, M+3… A single column chart or line cannot expose this without a two-dimensional matrix.
layouts.avoid_when: Cohort count < 6 or tracking window < 3 periods

layouts.title: Aging Bucket Page
audience: AR / credit controllers, inventory managers — anyone reviewing 'how old is this exposure'
layouts.use_when: Core question is *how much exposure is how old* (overdue AR, aged stock, open POs). The analysis demands a bucketed X-axis (0-30 / 31-60 / …) — a single-metric trend cannot answer it.
layouts.avoid_when: When AR/AP data uses non-standard buckets — customize first

layouts.title: What-If Parameter Page
audience: Planners, commercial analysts, anyone modelling scenarios
layouts.use_when: User must *change an input* (price, FX, volume growth) and watch downstream KPIs / charts update. Requires WHAT-IF parameters or numeric-range slicers wired into measures.
layouts.avoid_when: When target audience lacks modeling literacy

layouts.title: Advanced KPI Card Grid
audience: Execs who want *every* KPI on one screen with its micro-trend
layouts.use_when: Single page must summarize 12-24 KPIs with their trend and variance, and you have the `AdvancedCard` (OKViz / MAQ) custom visual available. Replaces a multi-card row when each KPI deserves its own mini-chart.
layouts.avoid_when: When all KPIs lack targets; use kpi-donut-row instead

layouts.title: Popup Mini-Canvas
audience: Quick-view consumers — executives who want a TL;DR without opening the full report
layouts.use_when: Page will be surfaced as a *quick view* — inside a bookmark button popup, embedded in Teams / SharePoint, or as a drill panel — where the full 1280×720 would be too large.
layouts.avoid_when: When the drill target needs full context; use drillthrough-detail

layouts.title: Ultra-Dense KPI Scorecard
audience: Supply-chain / ops leaders reviewing 60+ KPIs in one session
layouts.use_when: Review meeting requires every KPI on one page, grouped by function (Cost / Inventory / Service / Procurement). Acceptable audience: domain experts who know every metric name. NOT for casual consumers.
layouts.avoid_when: C-suite / board audiences — density overwhelms; use exec-overview-16x9

layouts.title: Executive Overview (16:9) (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `exec-overview-16x9`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Sales Performance (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `sales-performance`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Customer 360 (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `customer-360`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Balanced Scorecard / KPI Grid (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `scorecard-kpi-grid`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Finance P&L Waterfall (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `finance-pnl-waterfall`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Landing / Navigation Hub (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `landing-navigation`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: KPI Donut Row (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `kpi-donut-row`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Marketing Funnel & Attribution (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `marketing-funnel`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Advanced KPI Card Grid (Mobile)
audience: Execs who want *every* KPI on one screen with its micro-trend
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `advanced-kpi-card-grid`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Chiclet Nav Strip (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `chiclet-nav-strip`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Cohort / Retention Grid (Mobile)
audience: Customer analytics leads, growth / retention analysts
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `cohort-retention-grid`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Aging Bucket Page (Mobile)
audience: AR / credit controllers, inventory managers — anyone reviewing 'how old is this exposure'
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `aging-bucket-page`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Drillthrough Detail (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `drillthrough-detail`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Tachometer Gauge Row (Mobile)
audience: Ops managers, logistics supervisors monitoring KPI-vs-target status
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `tachometer-gauge-row`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Dimension Nav Hub (Mobile)
audience: All report consumers — entry point to multi-page reports
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `dimension-nav-hub`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.title: Executive Overview (16:9) (A4 Print)
layouts.use_when: Board-pack / PDF export variant of `exec-overview-16x9`. Paper-safe; pairs with print_safe themes.
layouts.avoid_when: Interactive digital viewing — print layouts drop drill/filter affordances.

layouts.title: Finance P&L Waterfall (A4 Print)
layouts.use_when: Board-pack / PDF export variant of `finance-pnl-waterfall`. Paper-safe; pairs with print_safe themes.
layouts.avoid_when: Interactive digital viewing — print layouts drop drill/filter affordances.

layouts.title: Operational Single-Screen Status Board (TV Wall 1080p)
layouts.use_when: Always-on wall-mounted variant of `ops-single-screen`. Read-only, 1080p TV.
layouts.avoid_when: Handheld / desktop use — TV variants use oversized type that looks wrong up close.

layouts.title: Manufacturing Line Status (OEE) (TV Wall 1080p)
layouts.use_when: Always-on wall-mounted variant of `mfg-line-status`. Read-only, 1080p TV.
layouts.avoid_when: Handheld / desktop use — TV variants use oversized type that looks wrong up close.

layouts.title: HR Headcount & Attrition
layouts.use_when: Monthly people review; headcount walk from starting to ending balance with hires/exits/transfers and attrition composition
layouts.avoid_when: When exit-reason data is not captured or the org is < 100 employees

layouts.title: Recruiting Funnel
layouts.use_when: Talent acquisition review — candidate pipeline, stage conversion, offer acceptance, time-to-fill
layouts.avoid_when: When ATS data exports < 4 pipeline stages

layouts.title: Compensation Bands & Comparatio
layouts.use_when: Comp review cycle — salary-band scatter vs market median with comparatio distribution
layouts.avoid_when: When market-data benchmarks aren't licensed or job architecture isn't defined

layouts.title: DE&I Scorecard
layouts.use_when: DE&I annual / quarterly report; representation by level + geography with trend
layouts.avoid_when: Where local regulation prohibits storing protected attributes in BI

layouts.title: Engagement Survey (eNPS)
layouts.use_when: Post-survey readout — eNPS headline, driver analysis, comment theme clusters
layouts.avoid_when: When survey n < 30 within a segment (confidentiality risk)

layouts.title: Org Chart with Span-of-Control
layouts.use_when: Org design / span-of-control review with manager-level drill
layouts.avoid_when: Matrix / dotted-line heavy orgs where a tree misrepresents structure

layouts.title: Incident Postmortem
layouts.use_when: Post-incident review — MTTR / MTBF trend, timeline reconstruction, root-cause pareto
layouts.avoid_when: Without structured incident data (severity, root_cause, duration)

layouts.title: SLA Heatmap
layouts.use_when: Weekly SLA review — service × time heatmap with breach cells
layouts.avoid_when: When SLA thresholds aren't defined per service

layouts.title: FinOps Cloud Cost Governance
layouts.use_when: Monthly cloud spend review — spend by service/team, anomaly detection, budget burn-down
layouts.avoid_when: Without tagged cost data or a per-team budget allocation

layouts.title: Release Train (DORA)
layouts.use_when: Engineering effectiveness review — deployment frequency, lead time, change-failure rate, MTTR (DORA)
layouts.avoid_when: Without CI/CD telemetry feeding a consolidated pipeline table

layouts.title: Service Catalog Health
layouts.use_when: Portfolio-level service health overview; tile per service with status + dependency ribbon
layouts.avoid_when: Without CMDB or service registry feeding status per service

layouts.title: Patient Flow
layouts.use_when: Live / daily patient flow review — ED to admit to discharge Sankey with wait times and census
layouts.avoid_when: Outpatient-only settings where flow is linear

layouts.title: Clinical Quality Scorecard
layouts.use_when: Quarterly clinical quality review vs HEDIS-style benchmarks
layouts.avoid_when: Without validated measure definitions or benchmark data

layouts.title: Readmission Analysis
layouts.use_when: 30/60/90-day readmission rates with risk factors and cohort comparison
layouts.avoid_when: Small-volume specialties (n < 50 discharges/month)

layouts.title: Pipeline Forecast
layouts.use_when: Weekly pipeline forecast — weighted stage-value, velocity, forecast vs quota
layouts.avoid_when: Transactional / e-commerce models without multi-stage pipelines

layouts.title: Rep Leaderboard
layouts.use_when: Monthly rep ranking with attainment, win-rate sparkline, goal tracking
layouts.avoid_when: Team-selling models where revenue attribution is shared

layouts.title: Inventory ABC Analysis
layouts.use_when: Inventory classification + turns + stockout risk for SKU portfolio
layouts.avoid_when: Make-to-order businesses where stock levels aren't held centrally

layouts.title: ESG Carbon Scorecard
layouts.use_when: Annual / quarterly Scope 1/2/3 emissions + intensity + target trajectory
layouts.avoid_when: Before emissions inventory is assured / audited

layouts.title: Narrative Story Page
layouts.use_when: Text-heavy insight narrative — scrollytelling style with annotated chart and pull-quotes
layouts.avoid_when: Operational audiences expecting dense KPI grids

layouts.title: Side-by-Side Comparison
layouts.use_when: A/B comparison canvas — two symmetric halves with a shared slicer
layouts.avoid_when: More than 2 entities to compare — use scorecard-kpi-grid

layouts.title: Paginated Export (A4 Portrait)
layouts.use_when: Tabular report tuned for paginated / PDF export; A4 portrait
layouts.avoid_when: Interactive digital viewing — use detail-grid layouts instead

layouts.title: HR Headcount & Attrition (Mobile)
layouts.use_when: Mobile / phone variant of `hr-headcount-attrition`. Same insight, stacked single-column layout.
layouts.avoid_when: Desktop screens — prefer the parent landscape layout.

layouts.use_when: Board-pack / PDF export variant of `hr-dei-scorecard`. Paper-safe; pairs with print_safe themes.
layouts.avoid_when: Interactive digital viewing — print layouts drop drill/filter affordances.

layouts.title: SLA Heatmap (TV Wall 1080p)
layouts.use_when: Always-on wall-mounted variant of `it-sla-heatmap`. Read-only, 1080p TV.
layouts.avoid_when: Handheld / desktop use — TV variants use oversized type that looks wrong up close.

collections.title: Finance Monthly Close Pack
collections.summary: Six-page pack used during month-end close — starts on a nav hub, walks through exec summary, P&L, waterfall, AR aging, drillthrough target.
collections.use_case: CFO / controller team circulating the monthly close deck via Power BI Service.

collections.title: Sales QBR Kit
collections.summary: Quarterly business review — nav hub, executive overview, performance deep-dive, customer 360, drillthrough target, wide tooltip for hover context.
collections.use_case: Regional sales director preparing for quarterly leadership review.

collections.title: Ops Daily Standup
collections.summary: Three-page operational set — single-screen status board, manufacturing line status, ops activity log for the standup.
collections.use_case: Shop-floor and NOC morning standup, displayed on wall-board.

collections.title: Marketing Campaign Readout
collections.summary: Four-page campaign retrospective — hub, funnel, customer segmentation, cohort retention.
collections.use_case: CMO reviewing paid / organic campaign results with the growth team.

collections.title: Board Deck (Print-Safe)
collections.summary: Print-ready five-page board pack — cover, exec overview, P&L, variance, drillthrough. Pairs with print_safe themes.
collections.use_case: Board of directors receiving the pack as a PDF export.

collections.title: NOC Wall-Board
collections.summary: Always-on dark monitoring set for network / infrastructure ops — status screen, line status, activity log.
collections.use_case: Displayed on a TV-wall in a network operations center. Pairs with high-contrast-dark or tech-monitoring-dark.

collections.title: Cross-Domain Executive Set
collections.summary: Generic five-page executive template — hub, overview, scorecard, KPI grid, drill.
collections.use_case: Starter kit for a new executive report when the domain is not yet narrowed.

collections.title: HR People Review
collections.summary: Quarterly people review pack — nav hub, headcount & attrition, recruiting funnel, DE&I scorecard, engagement survey, drill target.
collections.use_case: CHRO presenting to exec team; quarterly people health-check.

collections.title: SRE War Room
collections.summary: Always-on incident response set — SLA heatmap, service catalog, incident postmortem. Designed for TV-wall display.
collections.use_case: SRE/NOC response team during active incidents or weekly review.

collections.title: Healthcare Quality Review
collections.summary: Clinical quality + patient flow + readmission analysis with drill target.
collections.use_case: CMO and clinical leadership quarterly review.

collections.title: ESG Quarterly Pack
collections.summary: Sustainability quarterly — cover, carbon scorecard, narrative insight, print-safe export.
collections.use_case: ESG committee reporting to board; print-ready PDF distribution.
